positive: A highly detailed, stylized central composition featuring interconnected celestial forest flora and fauna. The scene should include glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, abstract stylized constellations forming pathways, and graceful silhouettes of mythical forest creatures (like stylized foxes, deer, and phoenixes) intertwined with swirling cosmic vines. Use a highly contrasting, neo-art deco ethereal aesthetic. Color palette: deep indigo, vibrant teal, luminous gold, and subtle lavender. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, maintaining clean lines and strong, defined silhouettes against a dark, starry background. Minimalist and symmetrical feel.
negative: blurry, poor quality, messy, grainy, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, monochrome, sketch, realistic photo, low contrast
